questions.scenario: The Orders API generates receipt PDFs and needs to store and fetch them by name. Which data shape is this?
questions.explanation: Receipt PDFs are file-like bytes that fit object storage.

questions.scenario: Orders, line items, payments, and refunds need relationships and transactions. Which first GCP service fits that shape?

options.text: BigQuery as the checkout source of truth.

questions.explanation: Related business records and transactions are relational data.

options.text: Analytical questions over many events -> BigQuery.
Every data problem -> one SQL table.

questions.explanation: The data shape should lead the service choice.
